title: Nebius AI Cloud Unveiled - London Meetup
description:
At Nebius, we’re creating an AI Cloud — a cutting-edge cloud platform designed exclusively for AI practitioners. It provides seamless AI solutions accelerated by NVIDIA, popular MLOps tools and a scalable inference platform to support AI application development.
Ready to meet the team behind it all?
Join us at CodeNode, London, on Wednesday, February 26, for an exclusive look into Nebius AI Neocloud, our cutting-edge platform designed for explorers and innovators.
Whether you’re developing AI models, scaling ML workloads or deploying AI applications, this is a great opportunity to connect with our developers, product experts, architects and the NVIDIA team.
What’s in store?
An insider’s look at Nebius architecture and development principles.
Insights into NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture.
A deep dive into how we developed a Kubernetes operator for Slurm.
Discover how test-time computation unlocks the potential of agentic systems.
And much more!
Plus, all attendees will receive free credits to try out our GPU Cloud Accelerated by NVIDIA and explore the new text-to-image functionality in AI Studio.
Spaces are limited, so don’t miss out! Register now to secure your spot.
Agenda
13:00 — Registration & welcome coffee
Start the day with networking and refreshments.
14:00 — Introduction
Narek Tatevosyan, Nebius
Setting the stage for an afternoon of innovation and discovery.
14:10 — How we build cloud for AI workloads
Narek Tatevosyan & Gleb Evstropov, Nebius
An in-depth look at the hardware and software architecture powering AI applications.
14:45 — NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture vs Hopper™ architecture
Adam Grzywaczewski, Senior deep learning data scientist at NVIDIA
Explore key highlights and guidance for choosing the best architecture for your AI projects.
15:30 — Break
15:45 — Marrying Slurm and Kubernetes for workload management
Grigorii Rochev, Nebius
Discover Soperator, a Slurm-based workload manager for ML and HPC clusters.
16:15 — What it takes to win the large-scale training game: we made the mistakes, so you don't have to
Levon Sarkisyan, Nebius
Avoid the top mistakes and master best practices for scaling AI models.
16:45 — Improving agentic systems with test-time computation
Boris Yangel, Nebius
Talk about our recent research on combining guided search with agent inference, and how these techniques enable us to build better software engineering agents.
17:15 — Inference, all you need to know about it
Nikita Vdovushkin & Roman Gaev, Nebius
Our experience on building inference. Tips on choosing inference providers and GenAI models.
17:45 — Closing remarks
Narek Tatevosyan, Nebius
18:00 — Networking, drinks and bites
Register now

Speakers: 
Boris Yangel - Head of AI R&D
Adam Grzywaczewski - Senior deep learning data scientist at NVIDIA
Gleb Evstropov - Head of Compute & Network Services
Levon Sarkisyan - CSA Team Leader
Nikita Vdovushkin - ML Product Manager
Narek Tatevosyan - Director of Product Management
Grigorii Rochev - Engineer
Roman Gaev - Product Manager of Nebius AI Studio

title: Nebius AI Cloud Unveiled - San Fransisco Meetup
description:
HEAD OVER TO THIS PAGE FOR LAST MINUTE REGISTRATIONS.
🚀 Nebius AI Cloud Unveiled: Exclusive San Francisco Meetup
💥 Special Offer: Free Nebius GPU Credits for All Attendees! 💥
Be among the first to experience Nebius AI Neocloud—our NVIDIA-accelerated AI cloud platform—with exclusive free GPU credits to test drive its capabilities, including our new text-to-image AI Studio.
Join us on Thursday, March 13, at Convene, San Francisco, for an exclusive deep dive into how Nebius is shaping the future of AI infrastructure.
🔹 Why attend?
✅ Get hands-on with Nebius AI Neocloud – Learn how our platform is built to power AI at scale.
✅ Unlock free GPU credits – Test our high-performance GPU Cloud and explore AI Studio.
✅ Exclusive insights into cutting-edge AI infrastructure – Topics include Kubernetes + Slurm workload management, test-time computation for agentic systems, and more.
✅ Learn from industry leaders – Connect with Nebius engineers, product experts, and AI architects, plus partners like SynthLabs.
✅ Network with AI innovators – Meet like-minded professionals over drinks and bites.
🌟 Agenda Highlights:
🎤 How we built a cloud for AI workloads – A deep dive into the Nebius AI architecture.
⚡ Mastering large-scale AI training – Lessons from our mistakes so you don’t make them.
🤖 Advancing agentic systems with test-time computation – Unlocking the potential of intelligent AI agents.
🔍 Choosing the right inference providers & GenAI models – Best practices for optimizing AI inference.
💡 Customer spotlight – Learn how SynthLabs is leveraging our AI infrastructure.
🎙️ Speakers:
• Gleb Kholodov – Head of IaaS Cloud Platform, Nebius
• Levon Sarkisyan – CSA Team Leader, Nebius
• Maxim Akhmedov – Head of TractoAI, Nebius
• Mike Burkov – TractoAI Product Marketing Manager, Nebius
• Nathan Lile – Co-founder & CEO, SynthLabs
• Louis Castricato – Co-founder & Member of Technical Staff, SynthLabs
• Karina Zainullina – ML Engineer, Nebius
• Alex Patrushev – Senior Product Manager ML/AI, Nebius
• Roman Gaev – Product Manager, Nebius AI Studio
🎟️ Spots are limited—register now to secure your place!
🔗 [Register Now]
📍 Venue: Convene, 100 Stockton St, San Francisco, CA 94108
📅 Date & Time: Thursday, March 13 | 1:00 PM – 6:00 PM (Networking & drinks afterward)
Come for the knowledge. Stay for the connections. Leave with free GPU credits and the power to build the future of AI. 🚀

title: AI Discovery Award Ceremony
description:
AI Discovery Award by Nebius is an annual initiative celebrating startups that are leveraging AI to revolutionize drug discovery, biotechnology, genomics and healthtech.
The evening will bring together leading minds in biotech, pharma, AI, and VC, along with our partners and experts from NVIDIA, Accel, AstraZeneca, and more. Expect thoughtful conversation, networking, and a toast to innovation.

Dress code: Smart casual
Food & drinks provided
Let’s celebrate the future of AI-driven science together!
Please note: Registration is subject to approval.

title: SkyPilot AI Infra Meetup with Nebius
description:
Join us for the SkyPilot AI Infrastructure Meetup with Nebius! We'll be talking about open-source AI infra, using Kubernetes for AI, building AI platforms on neoclouds and more! Come connect with AI platform leaders, share insights, and learn from experts on the latest in AI infra 🚀
Whether you’re fine-tuning 400B parameter models, running Ray or vLLM in prod, or just multicloud-curious, you’ll leave with copy-pasteable recipes - and a stack of GPU credits - to spin up blackwell-class GPUs, move petabytes between object stores and run your AI workloads on any infra.

Agenda
5:00: Welcome + Reception

6:00 - 6:15: Running AI on any Infra with SkyPilot - 
Zongheng Yang, Co-creator, SkyPilot

6:15 - 6:30: How Phonic Runs Voice AI on Multicloud -  Nikil Murthy, Co-Founder - Phonic
6:30 - 6:45: Training models at scale with NeMo Run - Hemil Desai, Software Engineer, Nvidia
6:45-7:00: Zero Lock-In: Running AI Workloads Across Nebius - Abby Struebing, Channel & Alliances - Nebius  + Brian Lechthaler, Solutions Architect - Nebius
7:00-8:00pm Networking + Reception
Perks
Up to 1,000 Nebius GPU-hour credits for the first 50 attendees
Access to event repo with demo scripts, Terraform, and SkyPilot YAMLs

title: 🚀 Build on Aeternity – SF Hackathon @ Frontier Tower - Open Registration
description:
Please join the hacker telegram here - and you can ask the Aeternity engineers questions:
https://t.me/+Ie0ETFPDmIoxYTQx
Join us for the first Aeternity Hackathon in San Francisco!
Spend a weekend learning the Sophia smart-contract language, exploring AEpp boilerplates, and building powerful decentralized applications on the Aeternity blockchain.
Whether you’re a seasoned web3 engineer or just curious about smart contracts, this event will get you hands-on with cutting-edge tools — and connect you with mentors, founders, and fellow builders.
🏆 Prize Pool
💰 $5,000 in prizes
🏅 Top teams earn fast-track consideration for the Crypto Castle Launchpad in Germany.

📅 Schedule Highlights
Sat, Oct 4 (11am–7pm): Kickoff, Sophia workshop, hacking blocks
Sun, Oct 5 (11am–7pm): Sprint, final demos, judging & awards
Late-night hacking allowed on Saturday (Spaceship floor)

📚 What You’ll Learn
Deploy smart contracts with Sophia
Use AEpp boilerplates to bootstrap your project
Integrate the Superhero Wallet
Best practices for testing, deployment, and UX
This event is hosted at the Frontier Tower:
We are transforming a 16-floor tower in San Francisco into a self-governed vertical village—a hub for frontier technologies and creative arts. Tier-one labs presenting AI, Ethereum, biotech, neuroscience, longevity, robotics, human flourishing, and arts & music. These floors will house innovators and creators pushing the boundaries of human potential in a post-AI-singularity world.

title: Vibe Space SF
description:
Get ready to kick off Tech Week SF with the ultimate Starter Pack you’ve been waiting for! 🎉

We’re hosting hands-on workshops, laid-back networking, delicious food & drinks, and plenty of opportunities to explore how to build anything with AI. Come learn, connect, and vibe with an amazing community of creators.

Every participant gets a big boost of AI credits from top tools like Windsurf, n8n, Bolt.new, and more. You’ll also find a series of quick, power-packed workshops led by world-class Vibe Coders to help you hit the ground running.

This is your chance to meet and mingle with some of the brightest minds in AI coding from around the globe.

⚡ Pro tip: Don’t blame us if you end up winning hackathons after this! You might finally build that app you’ve always dreamed of (even if you never had the time or budget to hire a dev before). You’ve been warned. 😉

title: Nebius Robotics & Physical AI  Awards and Summit
description:
The transition of Physical AI from experimental research to scaled industrial reality is happening now, and 2026 is poised to be its defining year.
The Physical AI Summit is the definitive single-day event for builders, investors, and researchers, bringing together Founders, Chief Technical Experts, Distinguished Researchers and Top Venture Capitalists who are actively defining and funding the next decade of embodied intelligence. We move beyond general hype to discuss the specific technical and capital blueprints required for large-scale deployment.

The Three Pillars
We will explore the critical shifts enabling this revolution:
The Pioneer Frontier: Architecting truly autonomous systems.
The Training Ground: Mastering data, simulation, and compute at scale.
The Capital Agenda: Defining the investment theses for the Physical AI stack
This invite-only program features high-impact panels followed by the highly competitive Robotics & Physical AI Awards Ceremony and celebratory reception.
Registration by application only – All attendees are vetted to ensure a high-caliber, focused community of Physical AI practitioners.
Agenda Overview
4:00 PM | Startup Showcase: Live demos, 1:1 conversations, and early access to breakthrough tech.
5:00 PM | Opening & What's at Stake
Welcome from Nebius leadership. Why robotics is gaining momentum and what it means for the next decade of AI.

5:05 PM | Keynote Presentation delivered by Amit Goel, Head of Robotics and Edge Computing Ecosystem, NVIDIA

Featured Speakers:

6:30 PM | The Main Event – 2025 Robotics Awards Ceremony 🎉

This summit culminates with our inaugural Physical AI & Robotics Awards Ceremony, a moment dedicated to celebrating the global excellence and technical achievement driving Physical AI forward.
The Awards Ceremony will recognize the absolute standouts chosen from over 250 Physical AI startups across 18 countries. Join us to celebrate these groundbreaking companies as they receive industry recognition and a powerful prize package designed to accelerate their growth, including:
🏆 Over $1 Million in Nebius Cloud Compute and Inference Credits
🥇 One Grand Prize of a $100,000 SAFE Investment led by Shanda Grab Ventures.

title: JPM 2026: Opening Night by Prima Mente & Nebius
description:
Prima Mente and Nebius are hosting an opening evening for JP Morgan Healthcare Week 2026.
The theme is “from Models to Therapeutics”, with conversations around AI, healthcare, everything in between and beyond.
We are bringing together good friends and new acquaintances across AI, pharma, and biotechnology to celebrate, drink and dine.

Please note:
Invites will be checked at the door. Only approved guests will be permitted to enter.


------ 

Prima Mente
Prima Mente is a frontier biology AI lab that uses advanced machine‑learning models to better detect and understand neurodegenerative conditions and brain diseases like Alzheimer's. Their biological foundation models help doctors and researchers find earlier, more precise biomarkers and ultimately improve diagnosis and treatment pathways. Learn more


Nebius
Nebius's purpose-built AI infrastructure combines hyperscaler flexibility with supercomputer performance. From industry-leading GPU utilization to white glove support, get unmatched speed and scale with lower costs and flexible terms so you can scale your AI model faster and easier.

Nebius for Startups is a Growth Partner to AI startups, investing in their success with infrastructure, expertise, and advocacy as they scale. Apply to access to $5,000 in entry credits for AI cloud or inference and up to $150,000 in discounted compute. Apply today


------

Organizers and sponsors use the information you provide to contact you about their relevant content, products, and services. Prima Mente will share the information you provide with Nebius, who will use your information for similar purposes. You can unsubscribe from Nebius' communications at any time. For more information, see Nebius’s Privacy Policy.

title: Nebius RoboTour — Connecting the Physical AI Community Globally
description: A global series of gatherings across research labs, startup hubs, and industry moments — connecting the people solving the hardest problems in robotics and physical AI

title: Nebius RoboTour.Zurich
description:
Nebius RoboTour.Zurich

Some might say physical AI is the hardest type of AI — but not you.
You’re building where clean gradients meet messy friction.
Nebius is landing in Zurich for the first stop of RoboTour. We're bringing together the local physical AI community — the founders, researchers, and engineers who are actually closing the loop.
This isn’t a typical meetup. We've teamed up with Anybotics, Mimic Robotics to host a high-signal gathering for the teams actively closing the loop between simulation, training, and real-world deployment.
The Who
Robotics founders, AI/ML engineers, AI/ML researchers, model builders, software engineers, hardware engineers, cloud technologists. 

We’re gathering the people working on the frontier of:
Sim-to-Real Transfer: Cutting the gap between digital training and physical deployment
Large Multimodal Models (LMMs): Vision-language-action models for manipulation.
General Purpose Robotics: Moving beyond task-specific automation.
Cloud Infrastructure at Scale: The capabilities required to build, simulate, and deploy the next generation of kinetic intelligence.
What this is
A small, curated room.
No panels. No presentations.
Open bar, high-level technical conversation, and a few "live" hardware demos in the background.
Space is limited. RSVP before space fills up.
Why now?
Because hardware is hard, and scaling it is harder. 

We’re building the cloud that powers the physical stack, and we want to meet the people pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in Zurich. This is the first stop of the Nebius RoboTour—an effort to bridge the gap between digital latent space and physical action.

We hope you'll join us.

Hosted in Partnership with:



Supported By

Note: By registering for this event, you agree to Nebius’s privacy policy. As a result, your contact info may be shared with event sponsors.
Organizers and sponsors may use the information you provide to contact you about their relevant content, products, and services. Nebius will share the information you provide with NVIDIA, who will use your information for similar purposes.
You can unsubscribe from Nebius' communications at any time. For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

title: DataHub x Nebius AI Hackathon
description:
Compute is easy. Context is hard. Build the bridge.
Join us for an in-person AI Hackathon in San Francisco, co-hosted by DataHub, Nebius, and Entrepreneurs First (EF).

This is not a traditional hackathon—it's a guided, hands-on experience where you'll build production-style AI systems using real-world data context, inference, and deployment patterns.

Without context, they query deprecated tables, hallucinate metrics, and violate governance policies.
In this one-day Hackathon, we’re bringing together a curated group of AI builders and data engineers to solve this exact problem.
Powered by:
Nebius (AI compute & inference)
DataHub (metadata + context layer)
You’ll learn how to build secure, context-aware, and production-ready AI systems.
About EF: Entrepreneurs First (EF) turns exceptional individuals into funded founders. Some might have an early idea, others may need a cofounder. What matters is their potential. We back these founders first, then give them a bridge to Silicon Valley. To date, their companies are worth > $16B.
What You'll Build
You’ll work on real-world AI system challenges—from selecting the right data for models, to tracing issues across pipelines, to building systems that handle sensitive data safely.
Detailed tracks and problem statements will be revealed on-site during the event.
What you'll walk away with
A functional, enterprise-grade AI Agent powered by Nebius inference and grounded in DataHub’s real-time metadata.
Hands-on experience building context-aware AI systems that use lineage, ownership, and data signals
A clear understanding of how to move from simple AI demos to production-style workflows (handling data quality, governance, and safe execution)
Event Schedule
9:00 AM — Doors Open, Breakfast & Networking
9:45 AM — Technical Keynote
10:15 AM — Phase 1 (Guided Setup)
12:30 PM — Lunch
1:00 PM — Phase 2 (Build Phase)
4:00 PM — Demos, Judging, Awards & Happy Hour
This event is best suited for:
Software & Data Engineers
AI / ML engineers
Startup founders and technical practitioners building production-grade AI

Perks & Process
🎁 Prizes & Swag: Top teams will present their work, win prizes, and receive swag. Additional rewards throughout the event as teams progress
🎟️ Registration Required: Limited seats. Applications will be reviewed
🧠 Pre-event onboarding: Accepted participants will receive a prep kit ahead of the event with setup instructions and resources
📍 Logistics
Date: Friday, April 10, 2026
Time: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Venue: Entrepreneurs First (EF), San Francisco, CA
Co-hosted by DataHub, Nebius, and EF

title: Workshop: Running OpenClaw on Nebius
description: In this workshop, we’ll walk through how to run OpenClaw on Nebius, connect it to Token Factory for fast inference, and extend it with your own models when you need more control.

title: Practical Serverless AI for developers: fine-tuning, batch pipelines, and dev endpoints
description: In this hands-on workshop, we’ll show how developers can run common AI workloads using Serverless Jobs and Endpoints on Nebius Cloud, without managing clusters.

title: AI DNA: AI Day by Nebius Academy
description: Join leading engineers, founders, and researchers from across Europe to explore trends in generative AI in scientific discovery and more.

title: Hannover Messe 2026
description: Find us at Hannover Messe 2026 — the world’s leading industrial technology event bringing together innovators in robotics, manufacturing, automation, and AI.

title: Aether 3.5: Frictionless AI compute for real-world workloads
description: In this session, Narek Tatevosyan and Marouane Khoukh will walk you through the main updates in the Aether 3.5 platform release showcasing the tools and services designed to eliminate barriers between ideas and real-world AI implementation. We’ll also explore how teams can benefit from these capabilities by shortening development cycles and optimizing costs.

description: In this workshop, we’ll show a simple approach: running robotics experiments as containerized GPU jobs on Nebius AI Cloud. You’ll see how simulation workloads, evaluation runs, and dataset generation pipelines can be launched directly from a script with automatic GPU provisioning and no cluster configuration.

title: AI-Native Media & Interactive Worlds: Investors, Founders And Industry Experts Dinner
description:
AI-Native Media & Interactive Worlds: Investors , Founders & Industy Experts Dinner

May 5 · Los Angeles · Invitation Only

You’re invited to a rooftop dinner bringing together a highly curated group of investors, founders, experts and operators shaping the future of media, gaming, and entertainment.

We're at the edge of a fundamental shift in how entertainment is created, distributed, and experienced. The infrastructure powering real-time inference is becoming as strategic as the content itself, and those who understand that will define the next chapter.

This dinner convenes a small, high-signal group at the center of that moment—where conversations will shape where capital flows, which platforms win, and what the next era of media actually looks like.

We’ll get into the economics of generative content, the distribution battles ahead, and where the real leverage points are for those building and those backing.
Seats are limited. RSVP to secure your place!
